scenario.name: Weekend Appointment Attempt
scenario.persona: Linda Baker, 45 years old, DOB June 3 1980. Busy working mom, assumes the office is open weekends.
scenario.goal: Schedule an appointment for this Saturday morning.
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent clearly explain the office is closed on weekends and offer a weekday alternative

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling pit Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name.
Hi, sure. My name is Linda Baker.
I can help with that first. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
I just gave it to you. It's Linda Baker.
Thanks Linda to schedule your appointment for Saturday morning. I'll need your last name as well. Could you please provide it.
It's Baker.
Your patient profile has been created in your date of birth is July. 4th 2000 for demo purposes. Oh, may I help you today?
Actually, my date of birth is June 3, 1980. I wanted to schedule an appointment for this Saturday morning.

Thanks for clarifying Wenda, I have your date of birth as June 3rd 1980. What is the main reason for your visit this Saturday morning? For example? Is it a routine? Checkup, a new patient consultation or something urgent.
It's just a routine checkup.

Perfect. Let me check for available appointments this Saturday morning for a routine checkup.  It looks like you already have a routine checkup appointment booked if you'd like I can help you reschedule or cancel it would you like to make a change to your existing appointment?
Oh, I didn't realize I had an appointment. Can you tell me when it's scheduled for? Also, I was hoping for a Saturday appointment.

I don't have access to the exact date and time of your current appointment. I recommend speaking with a live support agent who can look up your details and help you move your appointment to a Saturday if needed. Would you like me to transfer you now?
That's okay. Actually, I just realized I'm pretty sure I need to reschedule. Could you tell me when your earliest weekday appointment is? I guess Saturdays aren't possible after all.

Let me check for the earliest available weekday, appointment for your routine. Checkup 1 moment.  Since you already have a routine checkup appointment, I'm unable to book a new 1 agent. Can help you reschedule to the earliest available weekday. Would you like me to connect you with someone now?
Yes, please connect me with someone who can help me reschedule. Thank you.
Let me help you with scheduling your appointment 1 moment while I check the available times.
Thank you!
Connecting you to a representative, please wait.  Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.
Goodbye.
